title: [Project Name Placeholder]
description: This is a test instance generated from the shared template. Replace this text with project-specific summary when content is ready.

_editorGuide.note: JSON does not support real comments. Use this guide field to help editors.
_editorGuide.howToUseBlocks: Edit projectDetails.blocks in top-to-bottom order. The page renders blocks in exactly this order.

typeMeanings.h1: Largest heading. Use once at most for a major section title.
typeMeanings.image: Image block. Requires src. Optional alt for accessibility.
typeMeanings.video: Video block. Requires url. YouTube watch links are auto-converted to embed links. Optional title.
